container.description: Container is the target container within the pod (required).

script.description: Script is the rshell program, passed via `-c`. Full shell parsing applies (pipes, redirections, globs). Subject to rshell's 5 MiB script limit.

allowed_commands.description: AllowedCommands is the requested namespaced command allow-list (e.g. "rshell:cat", "rshell:grep"). Empty means default-deny.

allowed_paths.description: AllowedPaths is the requested set of filesystem sandbox roots (rshell -p).

mode.description: Mode is "read-only" (default) or "remediation". remediation enables file-target output redirections within AllowedPaths and is only honored when both the agent absolute max and the dca-local config permit it.

timeout_ms.description: TimeoutMs bounds total execution time in milliseconds. Clamped to the agent max.

ExecCommandParams.title: Exec Command Params
ExecCommandParams.description: ExecCommandParams contains parameters for the exec_command action. Runs a restricted shell program inside a container via the injected rshell binary. The policy fields below (allowed_commands, allowed_paths, mode, timeout_ms) are the backend's REQUESTED policy. The Cluster Agent narrows them (effective policy = payload ∩ dca-local config ∩ agent absolute max) and never widens them. Output (stdout/stderr) and the process exit code are reported via Event Platform.
